code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> Pending: TodoCreated
    Pending --> InProgress: TodoStarted
    Pending --> Cancelled: TodoCancelled
    InProgress --> Completed: TodoCompleted
    InProgress --> Cancelled: TodoCancelled
    Completed --> InProgress: TodoReopened
    Cancelled --> Pending: TodoReopened
    
    state Pending {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> NoDueDate
        NoDueDate --> DueDate: TodoDueDateSet
        DueDate --> Overdue: DueDatePassed
        DueDate --> NoDueDate: TodoDueDateRemoved
    }
    
    state InProgress {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> LowPriority
        LowPriority --> MediumPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        LowPriority --> HighPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        MediumPriority --> LowPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        MediumPriority --> HighPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        HighPriority --> LowPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        HighPriority --> MediumPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
    }
    
    classDef pending fill:#FFC107,stroke:#FFA000,color:black
    classDef inprogress fill:#2196F3,stroke:#1976D2,color:white
    classDef completed fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#388E3C,color:white
    classDef cancelled fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#616161,color:white
    
    class Pending pending
    class InProgress inprogress
    class Completed completed
    class Cancelled cancelled
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网执行器控制器设计一个任务状态机。核心流程是从PLC逻辑触发，经过Pending、InProgress，最终到Completed或Cancelled。Pending状态内部还要处理截止日期的子状态，InProgress内部则要管理优先级切换。
明白。Pending内部的子状态用MQTT Broker作为触发源，区分NoDueDate和DueDate，后者还能变成Overdue。InProgress内部用EdgeNode触发，Low、Medium、High三个优先级可以互相转换。这样理解对吗？
对，转换事件分别是TodoDueDateSet、DueDatePassed、TodoDueDateRemoved，以及TodoPriorityChanged。另外主流程上所有状态都应该支持TodoReopened回退。
主状态机和子状态结构已经画好。现在给四个主状态加上视觉区分：Pending用琥珀色，InProgress用蓝色，Completed用绿色，Cancelled用灰色，这样运维人员一眼就能识别任务状态。
Pending的填充色用#FFC107，描边#FFA000；InProgress填充#2196F3，描边#1976D2。文字颜色注意对比，Pending用黑字，其他用白字。
已调整。Completed是#4CAF50配#388E3C，Cancelled是#9E9E9E配#616161，文字颜色也按你说的设置好了。整个状态图现在符合工业SCADA系统的视觉规范。
最后确认一下转换完整性：Pending可以启动或取消，InProgress可以完成或取消，Completed和Cancelled都能重新打开回到Pending或InProgress。没有遗漏吧？
全部检查完毕。IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController的状态机完整，包含PLC_Logic触发、MQTT_Broker的日期管理、EdgeNode的优先级管理，以及四个主状态的样式定义。可以定稿了。
